item.title: Target Recalls Cat & Jack Children's Sandals Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Choking Hazard
item.company: Target stores nationwide and online at target.com from January 2026 through May 2026 for about $20.
item.brand: Target stores nationwide and online at target.com from January 2026 through May 2026 for about $20.
item.summary: This recall involves Cat & Jack-branded children's sandals. The sandals are tan and have two raffia straps with gold buckles and plastic pearls. The brand is printed on the shoe's sole and bottom. The sandals were sold in sizes 5T through 12T.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Cat & Jack Children's Sandals.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled sandals immediately, take them away from children and contact Target for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to return the sandals to any store or use a prepaid label to return the sandals by mail.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
